name: Carbonara Sauce
recipeIngredient: 8 slices Bacon, cut into 1/4 inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt softened butter over low heat.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and yolks together, then whisk in half of the Parmesan cheese until well blended.
3. Preheat oven to 200 degrees Celsius (200°F).
4. Bring a large pot of water and salt to a boil.
5. Meanwhile, fry the bacon in a skillet over medium heat until crispy. Remove from the skillet and set aside, reserving about half of the fat.
6. Stir in red pepper flakes and heavy cream into the reserved bacon fat. Simmer gently until the cream mixture is warm.
7. Cook the spaghetti in the boiling water according to package instructions until al dente.
8. Drain the cooked spaghetti and transfer it to a heated serving bowl.
9. Add the warmed creamed butter mixture to the pasta, coating well.
10. Stir in the hot bacon and cream mixture, then add the remaining beaten eggs and Parmesan cheese.
11. The residual heat from the pasta will gently cook the raw eggs.
12. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve with additional grated Parmesan cheese on top.
